markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, resolve workflow issues, and sync on upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** October is on pace to match September's traffic and conversions. Non-branded impressions are down due to Google's bot-traffic filtering, a trend seen across all accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - **LLM Visibility:** Strapi holds the \#1 ranking on Scrunch for most prompt categories, trailing only WordPress in "content management for developers" and "customizable admin interfaces."
  - [**Workflow Blockers:** The publishing workflow is blocked by a code formatting bug (fix due Friday). The Medium automation workflow is ready, pending article selection and approval.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Drafts & Bugs:** Two article drafts are awaiting publication after edits; Vivek will follow up. The `strapi.io/integrations` page is missing logos, likely a UI bug unrelated to recent GrowthX SEO work.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Workflow

  - [**Production:** 7 articles delivered last week; 7 scheduled for this week.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow Bug:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Issue:** Code blocks overflow, displaying as regular text.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Impact:** Blocks all article publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Fix is in progress; expected by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Medium Automation Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX sends 2–3 articles for approval → Strapi approves → GrowthX stages as drafts on Medium.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Limitation:** Medium API converts all headings to H3s.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Weekly, starting this Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**Drafts Awaiting Publication:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**Issue:** Two drafts are ready for publication but are not being tracked.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**Draft 1:** "Best AI Prompts for Web Designers" → Title updated to reflect `strapi.ai`.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [**Draft 2:** "Developer Productivity" → Title updated to "Developer Workflow" to avoid keyword cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [**Action:** Vivek will confirm edits with Usman and notify Theo.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [**Content Discovery Integration:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
      - [**Goal:** Integrate Octolens and Kappa for content gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
      - [**Status:** Delayed by engineering workload; scoping is now underway.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Expected within the next few weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

### Performance & LLM Visibility

  - [**Reporting:** Charts now use a monthly view for better long-term trend analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Traffic & Conversions:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [**October:** On pace to match or exceed September's performance.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [**Top Articles (Past Week):** "Svelte vs. React" (a new article), "Next.js vs. Nuxt.js," and "Strapi vs. Sanity."](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Impressions:** Down slightly due to Google's bot-traffic filtering, a trend seen across all accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**Conversions:** On pace to match last month. A slight quarterly reduction is noted but is not a significant drop.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility (Scrunch Data):**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - **Overall:** Positive positioning, with Strapi holding the \#1 spot for most tracked prompt categories.
      - [**Areas to Improve:** Trails WordPress in "content management for developers" and "customizable admin interfaces."](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### Website Bug: Missing Integration Logos

  - [**Issue:** Logos are missing from the `strapi.io/integrations` page.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**Investigation:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [GrowthX's only recent change was updating page meta info (SEO title/description), which does not affect UI.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Conclusion:** Likely a UI bug. Strapi's agency (Notum) is investigating.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [Send Theo a list of articles for Medium approval.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [Confirm edits on two drafts with Usman and notify Theo for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [**Paul:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [Investigate the missing integration logos bug.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Golzar:**](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [Follow up with Notum on the integration logos bug and tag Paul.](https://fathom.video/share/2S7wFbQMMHi_KsSMyRqF9pmgF7Pz9L5T?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
